name: Disney
bio: Disney soundtrack catalogs keep earning because family viewing cycles, singalong behavior, and perpetual franchise familiarity create long-tail demand across generations.
notable_for: Animated soundtrack standards with recurring multi-generational replay value.
career_highlight: Frozen and The Lion King remain two of the strongest family-soundtrack properties in modern catalog economics.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from global Disney soundtrack streaming, evergreen family replay, film and franchise reuse, compilation demand, and publishing participation across major animated standards.

ownership.master_owner: Disney-controlled soundtrack and label catalog economics across film and music divisions
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears controlled or administered across Disney-affiliated music entities and credited songwriters
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No external catalog-sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: This page models the Disney soundtrack catalog as a rights-owner catalog, not a single performer royalty statement.
